title: Samsung rlottie Numeric Truncation Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Samsung rlottie. Interaction with the rlottie library is required to exploit this vulnerability but attack vectors may vary depending on the implementation.
The specific flaw exists within the rlottie library. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of user-supplied data, which can result in which can result in an incorrect calculation before writing to memory. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.
addtionnal_details:
Samsung has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:
https://github.com/Samsung/rlottie/pull/595
timeline:
2026-06-26 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-07-15 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-07-15  - Advisory Updated
credit: Michael DePlante (@izobashi) of TrendAI Zero Day Initiative
